title: Joymode
excerpt: A few weeks ago, I decided to do a little impromptu photo shoot with my friend Rachel , complete with amazing pool floats from Joymode! It's a new service in LA delivering experiences so you don't have to own and…
body:
A few weeks ago, I decided to do a little impromptu photo shoot with my friend Rachel, complete with amazing pool floats from Joymode! It's a new service in LA delivering experiences so you don't have to own and store the stuff you'd want to have for just an event. I chose the Mini Pool Party experience mainly because I have been dying to do a shoot with pool floats. I called my friends who have a gorgeous pool in Brentwood and the whole thing came together in a couple days. We had an amazing time lounging around the pool in style and the best part of all was that I could just rent the floats for a few days and then Joymode picked them back up! The package comes complete with all that you need - the electric pump, attachment and cool floaties. 

photos by Ann-Marie Espinoza

I can't even tell you how awesome this was, considering the fact that finding storage for a giant swan would have been quite the challenge! I am such a fan of Joymode's motto: own the experience, not the stuff. YES!

This service is only in Los Angeles at the moment, and there is a waitlist. But for all you LA folks wanting to live in Joymode, you can skip the line and have a year membership for just $25 using the code: TANGERINEJOY.
